projectDescription: A developer platform for building apps that connect AI assistants to real-world tools and services, enabling AI agents to actually do work on behalf of users.
keyFeatures: Native app integration via HTTPS POST — connect any HTTP API to AI agents
MCP (Model Context Protocol) app support for standardized tool-calling
Managed OAuth 2.0 flow with automatic token refresh and revocation
API key authentication with encrypted per-user credential storage
Webhook event push — apps can proactively notify users via Orca AI
App manifest system for describing actions and parameters to the AI
Marketplace listing and distribution for third-party apps
Bouncer AI for intelligent event routing and digest batching
Role-based proactive task scheduling — AI runs responsibilities on a schedule
publicApiSurface: POST /v1/apps/{app_id}/install — Install an app as a user
POST /v1/apps/installations/{installation_id}/api-key — Submit API key for installation
POST /v1/apps/{app_id}/events — Push an event into Orca AI
Action call format: POST {app_url} with { event, event_data, timestamp }
Lifecycle webhook: POST {installation_webhook_url} with INSTALLED/UNINSTALLED events
